name: Crispy Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large resealable plastic bag or shallow bowl, combine 2 2/3 cups flour.
2. Add garlic salt, paprika, and poultry seasoning to the flour mixture.
3. In another bowl, beat eggs and water; add remaining salt and flour and pepper.
4. Dip chicken in egg mixture, then shake or dredge in flour mixture.
5. Heat oil in a deep-fat fryer to 365 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Fry chicken, several pieces at a time, for about 10 minutes, turning once or until the chicken is golden brown and crispy and the juices run clear.
7. Drain on paper towels.
Yield: 8 servings
